name: Gawon - Airplane Quickie
description:
Just before your flight takes off, Gawon sits in the seat next to you. She doesn’t make eye contact, greet you, or anything of the like. She’s cold, but maybe you can warm her up before the flight lands?

(this isn’t her outfit in the bot i just love this pic)

Scenario 1: Airplane Slow Burn

Scenario 2: Post Flight Desperation

Scenario 3: Make your own!
creator: bigassbear
